title.rendered: 20+ Digital Marketing & Fundraising Conferences for Nonprofit Professionals Worldwide

content.rendered:
Digital marketing and fundraising trends are constantly evolving and conferences provide an essential training opportunity for nonprofit professionals to learn from their peers and spark their creativity. In the era of COVID, in-person conferences have been halted and rescheduled or shifted to an entirely virtual experience, but in 2022 some conference organizers are moving forward with scheduling in-person events.

Please Note: The list below of digital marketing and fundraising conferences is in flux and it will be updated regularly.

The United States

► Peer-to-Peer Professional Forum

Dates: February 28-March 2, 2022
Location: Atlanta, GA
Cost: $895-945
Website: peertopeerforum.com/conference
Hashtag: #P2PForum22

► Nonprofit Technology Conference

Dates: March 23-25, 2022
Location: Virtual
Cost: $350-900 (View Pricing)
Website: nten.org/ntc
Hashtag: #22NTC

► Cause Camp

Dates: May 2-3, 2022
Location: Grand Rapid, MI + Virtual
Cost: $99-299 (View Pricing)
Website: nten.org/ntc
Hashtag: #CauseCamp

► Association of Fundraising Professionals International Conference

Dates: May 2-5, 2022
Location: Las Vegas, NV
Cost: $999-2,499 (View Pricing)
Website: afpicon.com
Hashtag: #AFPICON

► The Classy Collaborative

Dates: June 15-16, 2022
Location: Philadelphia, PA + Virtual
Cost: $399 in person, free for virtual
Website: collaborative.classy.org
Hashtag: #WeAreCollaborative

► The Bridge Conference

Dates: July 27-29, 2022
Location: National Harbor, MD
Cost: $590-695
Website: bridgeconf.org
Hashtag: #BridgeConf22

► Raise: The Event Fundraising Conference

Dates: September 12-13, 2022
Location: Chicago, IL + Virtual
Cost: $99-249
Website: onecause.com/raise
Hashtag: #Raise22

► It’s a Peer-to-Peer World

► Nonprofit Innovation & Optimization Summit

Location: Kansas City, MO

Website: niosummit.com
Hashtag: #NIOsummit

► Nonprofit Storytelling Conference

Dates: October 27-29, 2022
Location: San Antonio, TX + Virtual
Cost: $595-795 (View Pricing)
Website: nonprofitstorytellingconference.com
Hashtag: #NPStoryConf

Blackbaud Conference

Dates: October 17-18, 2022
Location: Virtual
Cost: Free
Website: bbconference.com
Hashtag: #bbcon

Our Certificate in Digital Marketing & Fundraising program covers the fundamentals of website design, email marketing, online fundraising, and social media for nonprofits.

The program requires the completion of three webinars and costs a total of $100 USD. To earn the certificate, you can attend the webinars live or view the recordings – or a combination of both. Learn more & register!
